title: Make Up Your Own Holiday Day
story: Every March 26, people around the world get to be holiday inventors! Make Up Your Own Holiday Day lets anyone create their own special celebration. Some people declare "Wear Mismatched Socks Day" or "Hug Your Pet Hour." Others make up holidays about their favorite foods, like "Pizza for Breakfast Day" or "Ice Cream Sandwich Sunday." Families might create "Backwards Dinner Night" where dessert comes first. Schools sometimes join in, with kids inventing holidays like "No Homework Wednesday" or "Pajama Learning Day." The best part? Your made-up holiday can be as silly, sweet, or creative as you want it to be!
activity_question: What are some examples of holidays people might make up on this day?
activity_choices: Wear Mismatched Socks Day and Pizza for Breakfast Day
Christmas in July and Halloween in Spring
National Reading Day and Earth Day
Backwards Dinner Night and Dance Like a Chicken Day
activity_answer: Wear Mismatched Socks Day and Pizza for Breakfast Day
follow_up_question: What silly or fun holiday would you create if you could make up your own?

title: Popeye's Power Plant Party Day
story: March 26 is Spinach Day, when leafy green lovers everywhere celebrate this super veggie! People share spinach recipes online, restaurants create special spinach dishes, and kids learn why this iron-packed plant makes you strong like Popeye the sailor man.
activity_question: What mineral is spinach especially known for containing?
bonus_fact: One cup of spinach contains more iron than a small steak!

title: Purple Power Day!
story: Purple takes over the world on March 26 during Purple Day! People everywhere wear purple clothes, eat purple foods like grapes and eggplant, and share purple photos on social media. This colorful celebration started to raise awareness about epilepsy, a brain condition that affects millions of people. Schools, offices, and entire communities join in by decorating with purple balloons, ribbons, and signs. Some people even dye their hair purple for the day! It's amazing how one color can bring so many people together to support an important cause.
activity_question: What do people do to celebrate Purple Day?
activity_choices: Wear purple clothes and eat purple foods
Only eat green vegetables all day
activity_answer: Wear purple clothes and eat purple foods
bonus_fact: The color purple was chosen because it's the international color for epilepsy awareness.

title: Sweet and Chewy Nougat Day!
story: Every March 26, candy lovers celebrate the chewy, sweet treat called nougat! This fluffy confection is made by whipping egg whites with sugar and honey, then mixing in nuts like almonds or pistachios. People mark Nougat Day by trying different types from around the world - French nougat de Montélimar, Italian torrone, or the nougat centers found in candy bars like Charleston Chew and 3 Musketeers. Candy shops often offer special nougat samples, and home bakers attempt their own batches using family recipes passed down for generations.
activity_question: What are the main ingredients used to make nougat?
bonus_fact: The word "nougat" comes from the Latin word "nux," which means nut!
